title: Ransomware Crisis Simulation
description: Phishing email leads to RAT infection, Active Directory compromise, ransomware deployment, business disruption, and recovery.

questions.title: How many users received the email?
questions.result: Thirty-five users received the phishing email.

children.title: Which departments received the email?
children.result: Finance, HR, and Procurement received the phishing email.

children.title: Who clicked the email?
children.result: Seven users clicked the malicious attachment.

children.title: Identify infected hosts
children.result: Five workstations show malware execution and C2 communication.
